expectations.text: Correctly identifies that pregen occupies 1 worker thread, leaving 7 for builders
expectations.evidence: 'PreGenerator.run() runs on this same pool via runOnSeparateThread. That consumes 1 of your 8 threads'

expectations.text: Explains that despite concurrency limit of 20, only 7 LODs can build in parallel
expectations.evidence: 'at most 7 of those 20 in-flight requests are actively building LODs. The other 13 sit in the pool's LinkedBlockingQueue'

expectations.text: Mentions the single-threaded DB executor as a bottleneck
expectations.evidence: 'All LOD saves go through AsyncLodRepository, which uses a single-threaded executor. Every completed LOD must serialize through this one-at-a-time database writer'

expectations.text: Mentions allowCoreThreadTimeOut or that idle threads die after 60s
expectations.evidence: Does not mention allowCoreThreadTimeOut or the 60s idle timeout. Discusses thread pool exhaustion but not the timeout behavior
